title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXX. Jingles.
content:
Gilly Silly Jarter,
        Who has lost a garter?
            In a shower of rain,
        The miller found it,
        The miller ground it,
            And the miller gave it to Silly again.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXX. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
